candidates.title: Hormuz Moves From War Map to Household Price Signal
candidates.why_now: AP reports today that Iran has proposed reopening the Strait of Hormuz if the U.S. lifts its blockade and the war ends; oil and equity markets are already reacting.
candidates.core_question: Can a ceasefire bargain reopen the chokepoint before energy prices harden into a wider inflation shock?
candidates.angle: Explain the mechanics of ships, insurance, mines, blockade language and oil pass-through; avoid treating one diplomatic offer as a settlement.

candidates.title: Odesa’s Port War Keeps Rewriting Europe’s Nuclear-Risk Vocabulary

assignments.title: Hormuz Moves From War Map to Household Price Signal
assignments.why_now: AP reports today that Iran has proposed reopening the Strait of Hormuz if the U.S. lifts its blockade and the war ends; oil and equity markets are already reacting.
assignments.core_question: Can a ceasefire bargain reopen the chokepoint before energy prices harden into a wider inflation shock?
assignments.angle: Explain the mechanics of ships, insurance, mines, blockade language and oil pass-through; avoid treating one diplomatic offer as a settlement.
